title: armeria × salmantica
intro: Armeria × salmantica, also known as Salamancan thrift, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the primrose family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Armeria × salmantica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to the skin.
